initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT AVG(ws_quantity) AS avg_quantity, AVG(ws_ext_sales_price) AS avg_ext_sales_price
FROM web_sales
JOIN item ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN warehouse ON web_sales.ws_warehouse_sk = warehouse.w_warehouse_sk
JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_month_seq >= 1200
  AND date_dim.d_month_seq <= 1200
GROUP BY item.i_item_sk, warehouse.w_warehouse_sk
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    i_item_sk,
    w_warehouse_sk,
    AVG(ws_quantity) AS avg_quantity,
    AVG(ws_ext_sales_price) AS avg_ext_sales_price
FROM 
    web_sales
    JOIN item ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN warehouse ON web_sales.ws_warehouse_sk = warehouse.w_warehouse_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_month_seq >= 1200
    AND date_dim.d_month_seq <= 1200
GROUP BY 
    i_item_sk,
    w_warehouse_sk
LIMIT 100
